title: NBT Toolbox
description: NBT toolbox is a modpack focusing on making custom NBT items and debugging minecraft!
body:
NBT Toolbox is a modpack focusing on debugging minecraft, if you are someone who likes to make custom items, if your making a server, or even if you want to test out your own mods/plugins/datapacks this is the modpack for you!

do **_/nbtedit_** to use the nbt editor mod
